title: Explaining the Rules
learningGoal: Speak fluently to explain rules and lack of obligation using must, must not, and don't have to.
instructions: あなたは新しい生徒に学校のルールを説明しています。マイクに向かって、「あなたは制服を着なければなりません。走ってはいけません。昼食を持ってくる必要はありません」と英語で話してください。(You are explaining the school rules to a new student. Speak into the microphone and say: 'You must wear a uniform. You must not run. You don't have to bring lunch.')
speakingPrompt: Say: 'You must wear a uniform. You must not run. You don't have to bring lunch.'
scenario: A new student is asking you about the school rules.

subTasks.prompt: State a strong rule using must. (You must wear a uniform.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ユー マスト ウェア ア ユニフォーム。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: あなたは制服を着なければなりません。

subTasks.prompt: State a prohibition using must not. (You must not run.)

sampleResponse.transliteration: ユー マス ノット ラン。

subTasks.prompt: State a lack of obligation using don't have to. (You don't have to bring lunch.)

sampleResponse.targetText: You don't have to bring lunch.
sampleResponse.transliteration: ユー ドント ハフ トゥ ブリング ランチ。
sampleResponse.baseTranslation: 昼食を持ってくる必要はありません。

scenarioContext.targetText: Hi, I'm new here. What are the rules?
scenarioContext.transliteration: ハイ、アイム ニュー ヒア。ホワット アー ザ ルールズ？
scenarioContext.baseTranslation: やあ、僕は新入生なんだ。ルールは何？

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ユー マスト ウェア ア ユニフォーム。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: あなたは制服を着なければなりません。

baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ユー マス ノット ラン。

baselineTranscriptSentences.targetText: You don't have to bring lunch.
baselineTranscriptSentences.transliteration: ユー ドント ハフ トゥ ブリング ランチ。
baselineTranscriptSentences.baseTranslation: 昼食を持ってくる必要はありません。

acceptableParaphrases: You must wear a uniform. You mustn't run. You don't have to bring lunch.

criteria.name: Modal Usage
criteria.description: Must use the exact modals for obligation, prohibition, and lack of obligation.

criteria.name: Pronunciation
criteria.description: Clear pronunciation of 'have to' (sounds like haf-too).

criteria.name: Verb Form
criteria.description: All verbs following modals must be base form.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.sampleAnswer: You must wear a uniform. You must not run. You don't have to bring lunch.

feedbackRules.onPass: Great speaking! Your rules were perfectly clear, and your modals were correct.
feedbackRules.onFail: Please try again. Pay close attention to 'must not' vs 'don't have to'.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort! Remember to pronounce 'have to' like 'haf-too'.

audioAssets.audioTranscript: You must wear a uniform. You must not run. You don't have to bring lunch.

hintText: Make sure you clearly pronounce the 'not' in 'must not'.
commonMistakes: Saying 'You don't have to run' when meaning prohibition.
